title: California Scents, Car Air Fresheners Can, Assorted Scents, Pack of 12, Strong Adjustable Long-Lasting Fragrance, Eliminates Odour
features: What You'll Get - 12 pack of Assorted California Scents Air Freshener cans (6 Coronado Cherry,2 Newport New Car, 2 Fresh Linen, 2 Ice)
Long-Lasting Car Fragrance - Air fresheners release immediate scent to quickly freshen your space for up to 60 days
Adjustable Scent - Features an adjustable lid to control fragrance output
Discreet Air Freshener - Can fit under seats and in cupholders so as to remain out of sight
description: From the manufacturer Car Scents x 4 Palms x 6 Vent Sticks x 6 Charcoal Bags x 6 Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 4,793 4.0 out of 5 stars 411 3.5 out of 5 stars 77 2.1 out of 5 stars 7 Price £9.39 £ 9 . 39 £6.49 £ 6 . 49 — no data — no data Features California Scents Car Scents deliver a great fragrance to your vehicle. The scent control cap provides as much or as little fragrance as you prefer. The canisters are ideal for all weather types and withstand high temperatures and humidity very well. California Scents Palms provide a strong and intense scent anywhere you want it. The super cute, palm-tree shaped scented paper, evokes images of California and is fun to have hanging around., whether it's in the car, at home or in the office. California Scents Vent Sticks provide an easy-to-use approach to adding incomparable scents to your car. Simply insert the sticks into your vent and enjoy the bold fragrance. California Scents Charcoal Pouches help clear the air and let you breathe in the freshness. Each activated charcoal pouch contains odour elimination technology that naturally purifies the air of smoke, food and pet odours that can take over your car.
